aggregate_rationale: no fixtures found in corpus directory. Lab-side captured corpus was empty at v1.5 ship-gate; re-run is deferred to v1.5.x per issue #188 dependency clause. Synthetic fixture run (see calibration_v1_4_0.json) confirms the same park verdict.

candidates.fire_rule: fire at first turn whose 4-turn rolling per-turn token average exceeds 1.5x the fixture-wide median per-turn token count
candidates.name: rate_of_growth

candidates.fire_rule: fire at first turn (after warmup of 4 turns) whose new-entity count drops below max(1, 0.5 * fixture-median new-entity count)
candidates.name: entity_density_delta

synthetic_reference.rationale: no candidate clears the v1.4 ship-gate (>= 0.05 absolute fidelity at same-or-lower token cost). Measurements: rate_of_growth fid_delta=+0.9323, ratio=1.461 vs threshold 1.017, entity_density_delta fid_delta=+0.0147, ratio=0.682 vs threshold 1.017. Parked for v1.5; see docs/context_rebuilder.md § Dynamic mode (parked v1.5).
